title: Java
description: Master OOP, JVM internals, Collections, Concurrency, Streams, and Java 8+ features. Deep-dive into the language that powers enterprise systems.

title: Spring Boot
description: Build production-grade microservices. Understand auto-configuration, dependency injection, Spring Security, JPA, and REST API design patterns.

title: JavaScript
description: Event loop, closures, prototypes, async/await, ES6+ features, and the nuances that trip up even experienced developers in interviews.

title: React
description: Component architecture, hooks deep-dive, state management, performance optimization, and building scalable frontend applications.

title: DSA
description: Arrays, trees, graphs, dynamic programming, and pattern-based problem solving. Structured approach to cracking coding interviews.

title: High Level Design
description: Design scalable distributed systems. Load balancing, caching, message queues, database sharding, and system design interview frameworks.

title: Low Level Design
description: SOLID principles, design patterns, class diagrams, clean code architecture. Build maintainable systems from the ground up.
